testcase.name: stream_returnsRateLimitErrorAfterLimitExceeded
testcase.system-out:
19:04:09.366 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.portfolio.chatbot.PortfolioAssistantControllerTest]: PortfolioAssistantControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:04:09.454 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.portfolio.chatbot.PortfolioChatbotApplication for test class com.portfolio.chatbot.PortfolioAssistantControllerTest

testcase.name: message_blankMessageFailsValidation
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-28T19:04:10.809-07:00 WARN 59915 --- [portfolio-chatbot-backend] [ main] .w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver : Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<?> com.portfolio.chatbot.PortfolioAssistantController.message(com.portfolio.chatbot.PortfolioAssistantController$ChatRequest,jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest): [Field error in object 'chatRequest' on field 'message': rejected value []; codes [NotBlank.chatRequest.message,NotBlank.message,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [chatRequest.message,message]; arguments []; default message [message]]; default message [must not be blank]] ]

testcase.name: stream_returnsErrorEventWhenRagServiceThrows
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-28T19:04:10.830-07:00 ERROR 59915 --- [portfolio-chatbot-backend] [ main] c.p.c.PortfolioAssistantController : Chatbot stream error
